case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. MAXIMINO CASTILLO VILLEGAS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $640.49 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT VILLEGAS, MAXIMINO CASTILLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-23-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILLEGAS, MAXIMINO CASTILLO $505.92 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $575.92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
